citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: AI-powered services are used to look up information, to provide voice interfaces to many kinds of apps, to make recommendations based on a person's interests, and to make cars safer.
